raw.subject: Your Albany page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you're closing early tomorrow due to a family graduation, and I appreciate the personal touch you bring to your business.

I sketched a page idea from your Facebook that highlights your services overview, photo gallery, and contact section, giving pet owners a clear understanding of what you offer. https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/paradise-pet-grooming-albany

I'd be happy to discuss how a simple website can support your business, and my flat fees make it affordable for local businesses like yours. Let's chat soon about how to get you started.
